curation_notes: Patch modifies two source files (weixin/msg.py and weixin/pay.py) adding XMLParser(resolve_entities=False) to etree.fromstring() calls. Locations derived directly from the patch diff: the parse() function in msg.py and the to_dict() function in pay.py both parse XML without disabling entity resolution. No sibling files in the weixin/ package use etree.fromstring(). Pre-assigned class xxe confirmed correct — CWE-611 maps directly and the patch explicitly disables XML external entity resolution.
